title: ANCSA Regional Association Opposes Ballot Measure 2
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE September 26, 2024 ANCSA Regional Association Opposes Ballot Measure 2 Anchorage, AK – The ANCSA Regional Association (ARA) Board of Directors has voted to oppose Ballot Measure 2 in the upcoming general election this November.
